NKE.rationale: Deteriorating fundamentals with sequential EPS declines to 0.14 amid high PE of 32.3x, negative 1y returns of -22%, and mostly negative news sentiment make NKE unattractive over the next year.

MCD.rationale: Strong net and operating margins with sequential EPS growth and positive news sentiment outweigh flat 1y returns and anomalous valuation metrics.
